nasb.text: Vedan and Javan paid for your wares from Uzal; wrought iron, cassia and sweet cane were among your merchandise.

esv.text: and casks of wine from Uzal they exchanged for your wares; wrought iron, cassia, and calamus were bartered for your merchandise.

cnv.text: 威但人用烏薩出的酒來換取你的貨物；他們用鍛鐵、桂皮和菖蒲，來交換你的商品。

ccb.text: 从乌萨来的威但人和雅完人用铁、肉桂、菖蒲与你交换货物。
